items.title: Statistically Sound Machine Learning for Automated Trading of Financial Instruments
items.author: David Aronson & Timothy Masters
items.blurb: Building predictive-model trading systems with the TSSB platform, with a hard focus on avoiding overfit and validating that an edge is real rather than data-mined noise.

items.title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
items.author: Martin Kleppmann
items.blurb: The reference for how reliable, scalable systems actually store and move data — replication, partitioning, and the tradeoffs behind every database pitch deck.

items.title: Deep Learning
items.author: Goodfellow, Bengio & Courville
items.blurb: The textbook. Dense, but it's the reason 'backprop through a transformer' stops being a black box.

items.title: Advances in Financial Machine Learning
items.author: Marcos López de Prado
items.blurb: Why most backtests lie, and a rebuild of the ML pipeline for finance from labeling to cross-validation.

items.title: Building Applications with Large Language Models
items.author: Valentina Alto
items.blurb: Practical patterns for wiring LLMs into real products — retrieval, tool use, and the glue code nobody puts in the paper.

items.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation in Practice
items.author: Keith Bourne
items.blurb: Came up twice this month scouting the RAG topic on the tech radar — queued to see if it's worth the reading time.

items.title: Prompt Engineering for Generative AI
items.author: James Phoenix & Mike Taylor
items.blurb: Solid primer, aged fast — useful for the fundamentals, less so for anything model-specific.

items.title: Algorithmic Trading
items.author: Ernest P. Chan
items.blurb: Mean reversion, momentum, and the unglamorous plumbing of actually running a strategy live.

items.title: Reinforcement Learning: An Introduction
items.author: Sutton & Barto
items.blurb: The canonical RL text — added after it kept getting cited in agent-training threads.

items.title: Agentic Design Patterns
items.author: Antonio Gulli
items.blurb: A pattern catalog for multi-step agent workflows — planning, reflection, tool routing.

items.title: Options, Futures, and Other Derivatives
items.author: John C. Hull
items.blurb: Still the derivatives bible. Long, but every chapter earns its place.

items.title: Team Topologies
items.author: Matthew Skelton & Manuel Pais
items.blurb: Recommended by three separate engineers this quarter — finally queuing it.

items.title: Streaming Systems
items.author: Tyler Akidau, Slava Chernyak & Reuven Lax
items.blurb: Windowing, watermarks, and exactly-once semantics — relevant to the scraper pipeline's next rewrite.

items.title: Understanding Deep Learning
items.author: Simon J.D. Prince
items.blurb: A newer, more visual take on the deep learning fundamentals — queued as a companion to the Goodfellow text.

items.title: Attention Is All You Need
items.author: Vaswani et al.
items.blurb: The transformer paper. Worth reading in the original once — every later 'attention' explainer is a gloss on this.

items.title: Let's build GPT: from scratch, in code, spelled out
items.author: Andrej Karpathy
items.blurb: Hands-on build of a GPT from the ground up — the clearest walk from bigram model to a working transformer you can find.
